Guide-page Tabs outside steps should usually sit inside `BorderedBox variant="accent"` unless the page uses a full-page tabs layout.
Guide pages should prefer `StyledSteps` / `StyledStep` over raw `Steps` / `Step`.
Code blocks should declare an icon. Use `icon="terminal"` by default.
Code blocks should preferably include a filename or title when it helps the reader.
